text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's an all-important Grand Prix race, and what's
more, Gold Ship will be in direct competition with
Tosen Jordan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. Mmmyes, thank you all for coming today.
Today, two Umamusume will face off in a battle
of wills...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And you'd all better get rrreeeady tooooo
rrrumbleee!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This is gonna be a race for the ages, and you'd
better burn it into your eyeballs!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Bring it! I'm gonna go hard today!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You know what? I will bring it! I'll take you head-on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems having good competition gets Gold Ship
really fired up for her races. I take it as a good
thing and make a mental note about it.
Splendid! Now that's what I call friendly rivalry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I could've sworn I heard a familiar voice just now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't see who said it, though, so I refocus my
attention on the race.
